category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool for Rust ORM Diesel; official Diesel organization describes Diesel as a safe, extensible ORM and query builder for Rust.
display_name_sources: Official Diesel site and GitHub organization use the display name Diesel; source_facts.name is diesel.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to the Getting Started guide; docs.diesel.rs provides official API documentation for Diesel.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/diesel-rs/diesel; per instruction, returned repo as null and did not second-guess it.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Rust ORM CLI; official Diesel docs describe ORM and query builder functionality.
